column1: # Taxon display name remapping for virome pipeline
# Use this file to rename taxa whose Kraken2/NCBI label is misleading in the
# context of human tissue samples — e.g. cross-species k-mer assignments where
# human reads map to a non-human reference due to reference database imbalance.
# This remap is applied AFTER artifact exclusion, to all three output stages
# (bracken_raw, minreads, filtered). It changes taxon_name only; taxon_id is
# preserved so the original assignment remains traceable.
#   Human CMV (HHV-5) reads assign to Cytomegalovirus papiinebeta3 (3050337)
#   because the Langmead viral DB contains only baboon CMV (NC_055235.1) under
#   taxon 2169863 (child of 3050337), with no direct HHV-5 Merlin genome at
#   the 3050337 node. Human CMV reads roll up to 3050337 via LCA. See:

column3: Database imbalance: human CMV reads assign to baboon CMV reference (NC_055235.1) via LCA; true identity is HHV-5. Awaiting alignment-based validation.
